chapter_title.ar: باب الْقَوْلِ عِنْدَ مَا يُشْتَرَى لِلتِّجَارَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 58 – The words during what one buys for the business

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/143)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/143)
text: إِذَا اشْتَرَيْتَ شَيْئاً مِنْ مَتَاعٍ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ فَكَبِّرْ ثُمَّ قُلِ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اشْتَرَيْتُهُ أَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ اللَّهُمَّ فَاجْعَلْ لِي فِيهِ فَضْلًا اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي اشْتَرَيْتُهُ أَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ [اللَّهُمَّ] فَاجْعَلْ لِي فِيهِ رِزْقاً ثُمَّ أَعِدْ كُلَّ وَاحِدَةٍ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Whenever you buy anything from a shop or something else, so exclaim Takbeer, then say, ‘O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I am buyind it, seeking therein from Your<sup>azwj</sup> Grace, so Send Blessings upon Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the Progeny<sup>asws</sup> of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! So Make Grace to be therein for me! O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! I am buying it seeking therein Grace from Your<sup>azwj</sup> sustenance. O Allah<sup>azwj</sup>! So Make sustenance to be therein for me’. Then repeat each one three times’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn Hariz who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When you buy merchandise or something say Takbir (Allah is great beyond description). Then say, ‘O Allah, I have purchased this and I seek in it your extra favor, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause. O Allah, place in it of your extra favors. O Allah, I have purchased it and seek in it sustenance from You. O Allah, place sustenance in it.’ Thereafter repeat each of the above three times.”’
